steps.title: Identify the range of speed
steps.content: The airplane's cruising speed varies between 125 miles per hour and 145 miles per hour. This means the minimum speed is $125$ mph, and the maximum is $145$ mph.

steps.title: Translate to an inequality
steps.content: Since s represents cruising speed in miles per hour, and it must be at least $125$ mph but not more than $145$ mph, the appropriate representation is: $$125 \leq s \leq 145$$

steps.title: Match to the choice letter
steps.content: • The inequality $125 \leq s \leq 145$ matches option D. Therefore, the correct answer is D.
